title: drosera aberrans
intro: Drosera aberrans, also known as the Western Sundew, is a carnivorous plant species that belongs to the Droseraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Drosera aberrans include its ability to help reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and soothe irritated throats. Drosera aberrans is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
